description: A hiring manager wants HR's help to create a structured 30-60-90 day plan for their new hire.

nodes.task_description: Provide the manager with a standard 30-60-90 day plan template.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP sends the manager the template document.

nodes.task_description: Consult with the manager to customize the template with role-specific goals and milestones.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP and manager work together to define key objectives for the new hire's first 90 days.

nodes.task_description: Upload the completed plan to the new hire's profile in the performance management system.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP saves the final plan to the employee's record for future reference.
